attributes.description: Single node deep dive with memory decomposition, working set utilization, network I/O, and eviction risk thresholds.

allColumns.label: View logs in Discover for node:

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.node.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.node.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.node.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = CASE(count == 1, DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created), "N/A")
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = CASE(count == 1, DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created), "N/A")
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created)
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
| EVAL ready = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    ready == 1, "Ready",
    "Not Ready"
  )
| KEEP ready

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
| EVAL ready = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    ready == 1, "Ready",
    "Not Ready"
  )
| KEEP ready

embeddableConfig.description: Node condition: Ready or Not Ready.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
| EVAL ready = CASE(ready == 1, "Ready", "Not Ready")

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), name = MAX(k8s.node.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, name, CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " nodes"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS name = MAX(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS name = MAX(k8s.node.name)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = SUM(k8s.node.memory.rss),
    working_set = SUM(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    available = SUM(k8s.node.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = SUM(k8s.node.memory.rss),
    working_set = SUM(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    available = SUM(k8s.node.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

embeddableConfig.description: Memory composition over time. RSS, working set, and available memory as separate series. SUM per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory composition

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    network_bytes = SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| KEEP timestamp, direction, network_bytes

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    network_bytes = SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| KEEP timestamp, direction, network_bytes

embeddableConfig.description: Network I/O over time by direction (transmit/receive). SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io)) per 1m bucket.
Pods on this node with phase, container count, restarts, CPU usage, and memory working set. Drills down to Pod Detail.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-*

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

FROM metrics-*

  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
